name: smart-health-monitoring-system
description: A comprehensive full-stack healthcare application with AI-powered triage and multi-portal architecture

scripts.install-all: npm install && npm run install:frontend && npm run install:backend && npm run install:ai
scripts.install:frontend: cd frontend/patient-portal && npm install && cd ../clinician-portal && npm install && cd ../operator-portal && npm install
scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:patient" "npm run dev:clinician" "npm run dev:operator"
scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:frontend: cd frontend/patient-portal && npm run build && cd ../clinician-portal && npm run build && cd ../operator-portal && npm run build
scripts.test: npm run test:backend && npm run test:frontend
scripts.test:frontend: cd frontend/patient-portal && npm test && cd ../clinician-portal && npm test && cd ../operator-portal && npm test
scripts.lint: npm run lint:backend && npm run lint:frontend
scripts.lint:frontend: cd frontend/patient-portal && npm run lint && cd ../clinician-portal && npm run lint && cd ../operator-portal && npm run lint

author: Smart Health Team
